title: Mega Man Zero
platform_style_description: Game Boy Advance aesthetic, bright controlled colors, portable action framing, and clean pixel readability
main_subject: a lone agile cyber warrior with an energy blade
environment: a ruined red-orange industrial battlefield with broken columns and warning lights
action_mood_cue: standing ready just before a dash into danger
composition: single cyber warrior only, one clear blade silhouette, slashed ruins behind, no crowd
memory_hook: fast dash combat, ruined future battlefield, and sharp handheld intensity
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Adventure game.

A lone agile cyber warrior with an energy blade in a ruined red-orange industrial battlefield with broken columns and warning lights, standing ready just before a dash into danger.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy Advance aesthetic, bright controlled colors, portable action framing, and clean pixel readability
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- urgent, sharp, heroic

Composition:
- single cyber warrior only, one clear blade silhouette, slashed ruins behind, no crowd
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Zero likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official saber shapes, avoid franchise insignia, avoid resemblance to mega man

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
